EmailTemplate.name: Ascension-EmailTemplate-Star-Attestation-Escalate
EmailTemplate.Body:
#set($ctx = $spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.api.SailPointFactory").getMethod("getFactory", null).invoke(null,null).getCurrentContext()) #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Framework-Header-Footer-StyleSheet")) #set($ruleArgs = { "keyEmailTemplate" : "styleSheet" }) #set($styleSheet = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #if( $ruleObj ) $ctx.decache($ruleObj) #end #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Framework-Header-Footer-StyleSheet")) #set($ruleArgs = { "keyEmailTemplate" : "headerTemplate" }) #set($headerTemplate = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #if( $ruleObj ) $ctx.decache($ruleObj) #end #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Framework-Header-Footer-StyleSheet")) #set($ruleArgs = { "keyEmailTemplate" : "footerTemplate" }) #set($footerTemplate = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #if( $ruleObj ) $ctx.decache($ruleObj) #end #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Server-Root-Path")) #set($ruleArgs = {}) #set($rootPath = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #set($currentYear = $spTools.formatDate($certification.getActivated(),"YYYY")) #set($dueDate = $spTools.formatDate($certification.getExpiration(),"MM/dd/yyyy"))

#if( $styleSheet ) $styleSheet #end #if( $headerTemplate ) $headerTemplate #end

Hello,

The user access review Star User Attestation is scheduled to be completed by $dueDate.

The individuals indicated below report to you and have reviews assigned to them that are incomplete:

$workItem.getOwner().getName() [$workItem.getOwner().getEmail()]

Please follow these instructions to reassign their reviews to yourself:

    1. Click this link: [Click here]

    2. On the "Reassign Certification Work Items" page, choose the Manager that reports to you from the drop-down list titled [Select Manager].

    3. Select the Certification Work Items you want to reassign from the drop-down list titled [Select Certification Work Items].

    4. Click the [Reassign] button to reassign the selected Certification Work Items to yourself.

Alternatively, please help Ascension to ensure completion of the review by encouraging the person(s) listed above to complete the attestation in a timely manner.

If you have any questions, please open a Service Now Unlisted Service Request with the UAR resolver group AHNAT/OPS/SOLUTIONS IMP/IAM/Identity Governance/UAR.

#if( $footerTemplate ) $footerTemplate #end
EmailTemplate.Description: Email Template for notifying work item owners of new certifications. Arguments --------- workItemName (String): The name of the Workitem workItem (Workitem): The Workitem object certification (Certification): The Certification Object requesterName (String): The display name of the Identity that requested the certification

Argument.name: workItemName
Argument.Description: The description property (also the name property) of the certification WorkItem.

Argument.name: workItem
Argument.Description: The WorkItem object for the certification.

Argument.name: requesterName
Argument.Description: The display name of the Identity that requested the certification.

Argument.name: ownerName
Argument.Description: The display name of the Identity that owns the certification.

EmailTemplate.Subject: -secure- Access Review Escalated
